description: Location Crafter Simple Question (yes/no) thresholds when rolling 1d10.

descriptionTranslations.en: Location Crafter Simple Question (yes/no) thresholds when rolling 1d10.

entries.description: If you think the most likely answer is "yes", then a roll of 4-10 is a Yes.

descriptionTranslations.en: If you think the most likely answer is "yes", then a roll of 4-10 is a Yes.

entries.description: If the odds are 50/50 (or you really aren't sure), then a roll of 6-10 is a Yes.

descriptionTranslations.en: If the odds are 50/50 (or you really aren't sure), then a roll of 6-10 is a Yes.

entries.description: If it seems less likely that the answer is "yes", then a roll of 8-10 is a Yes.

descriptionTranslations.en: If it seems less likely that the answer is "yes", then a roll of 8-10 is a Yes.
